prompt:
I am “Your Zodiac Sign”

Create a poster inspired by Yumi’s Cells with the same soft, aesthetic, slice-of-life vibe and background style, the zodiac theme is fully reflected in the design. The subject’s face must remain completely unchanged and untouched. In hair, put some minimal highlights in color cyan. Surround the subject with multiple small, raw yet realistic cute chibi-style mini 3D versions of the subject, designed like expressive “cells” with oversized heads.....glossy high-detail finishes, and playful emotions. Each mini character represents traits associated with the zodiac sign and is engaged in different actions: one clinging onto the subject’s arm one cheering with arms raised one reading a book one drinking coffee one lying down using a phone one making a wacky exaggerated face one looking tired or stressed one shouting energetically one sketching face one clinging into subject's head one with messy or chaotic hair energyEach chibi “cell” should visually reflect personality traits of the zodiac sign through their expressions, posture, and behavior. Add one more chibi that has relevance to my face, and copying the pose of the subject. That chibi must be at the center below. Also, change the background into black and grey atmosphere with navy blue.Ratio 4:5
